summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented in the diff. NoteCard.tsx and NoteModal.tsx have been modified to compute and use natural image aspect ratios (removing fixed aspect-ratio classes), and RoutinesPage.tsx has been updated to integrate the ImageUploadPicker component with local image storage helpers, camera support, and the same upload options as the Notes section. No obvious missing requirements were found, though some files were truncated.

hallucinated_features.description: Custom localStorage-based image storage (saveRoutineImage, getRoutineImage, deleteRoutineImage, compressImageToDataUrl) was added to RoutinesPage instead of reusing the existing useImageStorage hook used in Notes.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 states the image handling logic must be copied exactly from the Notes implementation. The Notes implementation uses the useImageStorage hook, but RoutinesPage introduces a separate localStorage-based storage mechanism not present in Notes.

hallucinated_features.description: A CameraModal sub-component and useCamera hook integration was added to RoutinesPage.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 specifies copying the implementation identically from Notes. If Notes does not use a separate CameraModal or useCamera hook and instead uses ImageUploadPicker directly, this additional component goes beyond the identical copy requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Natural aspect ratio computation via loading the image and measuring naturalWidth/naturalHeight was added to NoteCard.tsx using a useEffect/useState pattern rather than simply removing fixed aspect-ratio CSS classes.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 only requires removing fixed aspect-ratio constraints so images display at natural dimensions. Programmatically computing and storing the natural aspect ratio adds complexity beyond what was requested.
